title: Scrollbar
text: Scrollbar Specifies whether an entity scrollbar is displayed, and its position. Valid values are Automatic (default), No , Yes , Top , Bottom , Left , Right . Value Description Automatic Scrollbar is displayed if multiple occurrences are retrieved. No No scrollbar Yes Scrollbar is allowed; positioned on the right. Top Scrollbar is positioned at the top of the entity; use for horizontal repetition. Bottom Scrollbar is positioned at the bottom of the entity; use for horizontal repetition. Left Scrollbar is positioned to the left of the entity; use for vertical repetition. Right Scrollbar is positioned to the right of the entity; use for vertical repetition. Applies To Entity Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
